channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Graduating Students join us for RPI’s Lavender Graduation on May 13!
item.description: Join us in celebrating Rensselaer students of the LGBTQ+ community at Lavender Graduation! This is sure to be an inclusive and celebratory experience. We look forward to acknowledging your accomplishments and evolutions into college graduates of Rensselaer. Business casual recommended but come as you feel comfortable. Graduating students who wish to be recognized must register at the linked attached by Sunday, May 10. For Questions, email the LGBTQ+ Task Force at lgbtqtaskforce@rpi.edu.
item.author: Students

item.title: Graduating Students join us for the Intercultural Celebration on May 12!
item.description: Join us at the Intercultural Celebration, as part of RPI’s Graduating Student Week, this casual events recognizes and honors the achievements, experiences, and contributions of graduating students from a wide range of identities and backgrounds within the RPI community. Graduating students are invited to join this celebration to reflect on their journeys, connect with peers with Graduation Cap Decorating, Hors d’oeuvres, music, games, and Photo Ops with our RPI Banner! Register today!
item.author: Students

item.title: Physics 1 Hype Squad
item.description: Date: Monday, May 4, 2026 7:35 AM - 8:05 AM - The FYE team will be stationed in front of Russell Sage Dining Hall to wish you well on your Physics 1 exam! Swing by on your way to the exam for a mini pep rally and some sweet treats!
item.author: Students

item.title: CSCI 1100 Hype Squad
item.description: Date: Monday, May 4, 2026 11:10 AM - 11:40 AM - The FYE team will be stationed in front of Russell Sage Dining Hall to wish you well on your Computer Science 1 exam! Swing by on your way to the exam for a mini pep rally and some sweet treats!
item.author: Students

item.title: Final Exam Review Sessions: Week of 4/29-5/6
item.description: Prepare for Final Exams with the Success Center Tutors! All Final Reviews will be at the Success Center. Please check-in at our front desk! -Strengths Final Review: Thursday 4/30 (5-7pm) -Thermo Final Review: Thursday, 4/30 (7-9pm) -CS I Final Review: Thursday, 4/30 (8-10pm) -Physics I Final Review: Friday, 5/1 (1-3pm) -Cal II Final Review: Friday, 5/1 (3-5pm) -MAU Final Review: Sunday, 5/3 (1-3pm) -MANE 1010 Essence of Eng. Final Review: Sunday 5/3 (1-3pm) -Eng. Probability Final Review:…
item.author: Students

item.title: 2026 Campus-Wide Planned Steam and Electrical Maintenance Schedule
item.description: Planned campus-wide steam and electrical maintenance is scheduled for Saturday, May 9 through Friday, May 15, 2026. These outages are necessary to complete critical maintenance, inspections, and testing of central utility and electrical infrastructure.
item.author: Community

item.title: North American Conference on Video Game Music
item.description: The North American Conference on Video Game Music (NACVGM) returns May 1–2, 2026 as a hybrid event hosted at RPI at EMPAC. The conference features a dynamic program of scholarly papers, panels, and creative work, alongside performances and opportunities for community engagement. Participants present 20- and 10-minute talks, poster sessions, and demonstrations of game and sound art, reflecting the breadth of contemporary approaches to game audio research and practice.
item.author: Community

item.title: Sherry Road lot changes
item.description:
Effective Monday, May 4, Sherry Road lot will transition to pay per hour parking only. Please ensure your parking session is active for the duration of your stay, as vehicles without valid payment may be subject to enforcement. For additional information, please contact Parking and Transportation Services.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
